set.body:
Child of bd-01KXZQCRJQ02WXW3PRY5BTQY5K.

Goal: generalize the QR-specific DenseWorkspace idea into composable cross-platform scratch planning.

Scope and acceptance:
- Define checked scratch requirements for primitive Double and index storage.
- Support composition for simultaneously live buffers and mutually exclusive algorithm paths.
- Provide grow-only reusable workspace storage without exposing its backing arrays.
- Let selected algorithms report requirements before execution.
- Retrofit at least two independently measured hot algorithm families chosen by the allocation-evidence issue; do not perform a speculative whole-repository rewrite.
- Preserve simple allocating facades and deterministic pure behavior.
- Test exact sizing, overflow, zero-size requirements, composition laws, reuse identity, and JVM/Scala.js allocation budgets.
set.title: Generalize composable scratch requirements and reusable workspaces
